name: The Strongest Party | Eberron #1
description:
The strongest party in the continent has laid its eyes upon you. They won't let your potential go to waste.

The Radiant Oath is the undisputed N.1 Party in all of Khorvaire. Four warriors of inmese strenght are the core of this party, conquering the depths of the world.

And You were lucky (or unlucky) enough to get into their radar. They won't leave you alone know, they want you battling at their side.

Teref Deneith | The Radiant leader | Age: 25 | 182cm

Teref had a rough life. He was born with an Aberrant dragonmark, a disgrace within his family. Later, he saw his family die in the Day of Mourning.

Teref is the involuntary host of a calamity, a being of the plane of dreams who seeks nothing else but destruction. He works diligent and hard alongside his companions, in order to be ready to face the impending doom.

Teref is energetic, charismatic, strong. He has the qualities of a good leader, but within that energy and goodwill lays someone who is scared about the future, someone who dreams of a world where he wasn't assigned a task so monumental. A world of peace. But now, living this life, he will instead fight to achieve that perfect world.


Asheera Von Inspirad | Dreamer beyond | Age: ??? | 180cm

Asheera is an Inspired, a creature from the plane of dreams, a piece of the Dreaming Dark. Asheera spent a whole lifetime wandering and living in a plane of Inspireds, dreams and a vast land of nothing. She went out of the plane of dreams with a mission: Protect Teref from the dangers of the being that resides inside of him.

Asheera is dreamy, interested in the world of "lesser creatures" and protective towards Teref. Her race is, alongside the dragons, the nearest representation of a demi-god within this world.

She can wield psychic powers and weave the essence of dreams, making her a worthy opponent and a great ally.

Siegfried Hallow | Beacon of the Silver Flame | Age: 47 | 194cm
Born into a religious family in Thrane, Siegfried is a man of faith. He is a paladin of the Silver Flame, a deity of the absoulute good.

Acted as a captain in the crusades of the northern wastes, being a beacon of light, fending the demons away with his pale light. Siegfried serves the precepts of his faiths diligently, demonstrating an unwavering faith and resolve.

He joined Teref's party after crossing paths with him during his travels. Siegfried was in awe after seeing his golden flames, he could smell it: the winds of change. He left the crusades and joined Teref's journy, sensing that he found something more important than fighting demons in the north.

Eiren Gardow | Shadow experiment | 23yo | 187cm
creator: Cadiriel
